title: ブロンズコレクターの狙い

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I bought all the stationery I needed. It's
time to go to the training—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa... the "Meow Meow Adorbs Lottery?!" They brought it back!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean... I'm probably just going to win
third-prize. That's just how the universe works
around me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait... the plushie for the third place is sooo cute!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the legendary "Bronze Collector" to
shine!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?! Why now?! ...Let's do one more!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: First and then second-prize... Why am I not getting third when I actually want it...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait, Nature, what comes after first and second?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Just one more... I just have to rush to training
once I get this third-prize...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Fourth!? ...Come on, fourth time's a charm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Desperate for the prize, Nice Nature skips her
training for the day.
